other_observers: Nick Moore, independently noted field marks, and agreed with ID
description: Smaller headed and shorter billed than COTE present. Shorter legged. Head white with more extensive black tonsure than COTE (black from just in front of eyes wrapping around back of head to other side), extending up onto crown. Bill mostly or entirely black. Underparts white. Mantle pearly gray except dusky carpal bar and white secondaries extending onto (or so appeared ) innermost primaries and part of posterior secondary coverts , so that white formed poorly defined triangle at rear if wings centered on secondaries. Primaries appeared did not have significant black on them. A narrow hint of dusky on trailing edge of primaries. Below, wings white with narrow black trailing edge to primaries. Bouncier flight than COTE, which was seen in close proxmity
